   "source": [
    "# Cell 1: Import Libraries\n",
    "\n",
    "# Data Handling and Analysis\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "\n",
    "# Data Collection\n",
    "import yfinance as yf\n",
    "\n",
    "# Visualization\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "\n",
    "# Machine Learning and Deep Learning\n",
    "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler\n",
    "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
    "from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error, r2_score\n",
    "import tensorflow as tf\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense, LSTM, Dropout\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.callbacks import EarlyStopping\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.optimizers import Adam\n",
    "\n",
    "# Data Processing\n",
    "from scipy import stats\n",
    "\n",
    "# Time Series Analysis\n",
    "import statsmodels.api as sm\n",
    "import ta\n",
    "\n",
    "# Utilities\n",
    "from datetime import datetime, timedelta\n",
    "from collections import defaultdict\n",
    "from tqdm import tqdm\n",
    "import os\n",
    "import logging\n",
    "import time\n",
    "\n",
    "# Logging Setup\n",
    "logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Set plotting style\n",
    "sns.set(style='darkgrid')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Ignore warnings (optional)\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check TensorFlow version (optional)\n",
    "print(f\"TensorFlow Version: {tf.__version__}\")"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# Cell 2: Fetch the Stock Data\n",
    "\n",
    "# Setup logging\n",
    "logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Initialize dictionaries to store dataframes\n",
    "daily_data_dict = {}\n",
    "hourly_data_dict = {}\n",
    "additional_info_dict = {}\n",
    "financials_dict = {}\n",
    "balance_sheet_dict = {}\n",
    "cash_flow_dict = {}\n",
    "\n",
    "# List of stocks to fetch data for\n",
    "stocks = [\n",
    "    'AAPL', 'MSFT', 'GOOGL', 'NVDA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'JNJ', 'PFE', 'UNH',\n",
    "    'JPM', 'BAC', 'GS', 'PG', 'KO', 'WMT', 'XOM', 'CVX', 'BA', 'HON', 'VZ'\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Define the time frames for data\n",
    "end_date = datetime.now()\n",
    "start_date_daily = end_date - timedelta(days=4*365)\n",
    "start_date_hourly = end_date - timedelta(days=729)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create directories for the data\n",
    "os.makedirs('../data/missing_data', exist_ok=True) \n",
    "os.makedirs('../data/stock_data', exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to fetch stock data\n",
    "def fetch_stock_data(ticker, start, end, interval):\n",
    "    try:\n",
    "        data = yf.download(ticker, start=start, end=end, interval=interval)\n",
    "        if data.empty:\n",
    "            logging.warning(f\"No data retrieved for {ticker} from {start} to {end} with interval {interval}\")\n",
    "        return data.drop(columns=['Adj Close'], errors='ignore')\n",
    "    except Exception as e:\n",
    "        logging.error(f\"Error fetching data for {ticker}: {e}\")\n",
    "        return pd.DataFrame()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to fetch additional fundamental data\n",
    "def fetch_additional_data(ticker):\n",
    "    try:\n",
    "        stock = yf.Ticker(ticker)\n",
    "        info = stock.info\n",
    "        additional_info = {\n",
    "            'PE_Ratio': info.get('trailingPE', np.nan),\n",
    "            'Market_Cap': info.get('marketCap', np.nan),\n",
    "            'Dividend_Yield': info.get('dividendYield', np.nan),\n",
    "            'EPS': info.get('trailingEps', np.nan),\n",
    "            'Beta': info.get('beta', np.nan),\n",
    "            'PB_Ratio': info.get('priceToBook', np.nan)\n",
    "        }\n",
    "\n",
    "        # Log missing data for critical fields only\n",
    "        missing_data = [k for k, v in additional_info.items() if pd.isna(v)]\n",
    "        if missing_data:\n",
    "            logging.warning(f\"Missing data for {ticker}: {missing_data}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "        financials = stock.financials.T\n",
    "        balance_sheet = stock.balance_sheet.T\n",
    "        cash_flow = stock.cashflow.T\n",
    "\n",
    "        return additional_info, financials, balance_sheet, cash_flow\n",
    "    except Exception as e:\n",
    "        logging.error(f\"Error fetching additional data for {ticker}: {e}\")\n",
    "        return {}, pd.DataFrame(), pd.DataFrame(), pd.DataFrame()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Fetch and save data\n",
    "for idx, stock in enumerate(tqdm(stocks, desc=\"Fetching stocks data\")):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Daily Data (3 years)\n",
    "    daily_data = fetch_stock_data(stock, start_date_daily, end_date, '1d')\n",
    "    daily_data_dict[stock] = daily_data\n",
    "    daily_data.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_daily.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Hourly Data (2 years, actually 729 days)\n",
    "    hourly_data = fetch_stock_data(stock, start_date_hourly, end_date, '1h')\n",
    "    hourly_data_dict[stock] = hourly_data\n",
    "    hourly_data.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_hourly.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Additional Fundamental Data (3 years)\n",
    "    additional_info, financials, balance_sheet, cash_flow = fetch_additional_data(stock)\n",
    "    additional_info_dict[stock] = additional_info\n",
    "    financials_dict[stock] = financials\n",
    "    balance_sheet_dict[stock] = balance_sheet\n",
    "    cash_flow_dict[stock] = cash_flow\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Save the financial data to CSV files\n",
    "    financials.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_financials.csv', index=True)\n",
    "    balance_sheet.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_balance_sheet.csv', index=True)\n",
    "    cash_flow.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_cash_flow.csv', index=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Convert additional_info to DataFrame and save it\n",
    "    additional_info_df = pd.DataFrame([additional_info])\n",
    "    additional_info_df.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_additional_info.csv', index=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "    time.sleep(2)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Data fetching and saving complete.\")"
   ]
  },

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Cell 3: Drop Irrelevant Columns, 2019 Data, and Specific Columns for All Stocks\n",
    "\n",
    "# List of columns to drop based on previous analysis\n",
    "columns_to_drop = [\n",
    "    'Treasury Shares Number', 'Deferred Tax Assets', 'Deferred Tax Liabilities', \n",
    "    'Prepaid Assets', 'Employee Benefits', 'Inventory Adjustments', 'Other Receivables', \n",
    "    'Gain/Loss on Sale of Assets', 'Current Deferred Liabilities', 'Deferred Revenue', \n",
    "    'Non-Current Prepaid Assets', 'Other Intangible Assets', 'Ordinary Shares Number', \n",
    "    'Other Non Current Liabilities', 'Gross PPE', 'Net PPE', 'Net Tangible Assets', \n",
    "    'Other Equity Adjustments', 'Other Short Term Investments', 'Total Tax Payable', \n",
    "    'Other Investments', 'Net PPE Purchase And Sale', 'Repurchase Of Capital Stock', \n",
    "    'Gain Loss On Investment Securities', 'Other Non Cash Items',\n",
    "    # Additional columns to drop\n",
    "    'Special Income Charges', 'Other Special Charges', 'Other Payable', \n",
    "    'Inventory', 'Taxes Receivable', 'Net Intangibles Purchase and Sale', \n",
    "    'Purchase of Intangibles', 'Amortization Cash Flow', \n",
    "    'Amortization of Intangibles'\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to drop columns, remove 2019 data, and show stats before and after\n",
    "def drop_columns_and_remove_2019(df_dict, columns_to_drop):\n",
    "    stats_before = {}\n",
    "    stats_after = {}\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for stock, df in df_dict.items():\n",
    "        if not df.empty:  # Ensure there is data to process\n",
    "            # Capture stats before dropping columns and 2019 data\n",
    "            stats_before[stock] = {\n",
    "                'Total Columns': df.shape[1],\n",
    "                'Missing Values': df.isnull().sum().sum()\n",
    "            }\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Drop the irrelevant columns\n",
    "            df_dropped = df.drop(columns=columns_to_drop, errors='ignore')\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Drop the 2019 data by filtering out that year from the index\n",
    "            df_dropped = df_dropped[df_dropped.index >= '2021-01-01']\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Capture stats after dropping columns and 2019 data\n",
    "            stats_after[stock] = {\n",
    "                'Total Columns': df_dropped.shape[1],\n",
    "                'Missing Values': df_dropped.isnull().sum().sum()\n",
    "            }\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Update the dataframe in the dictionary\n",
    "            df_dict[stock] = df_dropped\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return stats_before, stats_after\n",
    "\n",
    "# Apply the function to all financial dataframes\n",
    "financials_before, financials_after = drop_columns_and_remove_2019(financials_dict, columns_to_drop)\n",
    "balance_sheet_before, balance_sheet_after = drop_columns_and_remove_2019(balance_sheet_dict, columns_to_drop)\n",
    "cash_flow_before, cash_flow_after = drop_columns_and_remove_2019(cash_flow_dict, columns_to_drop)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 26,
   "id": "53ba1ea9-f6a4-49b9-a1e3-f7d856ffb66a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Outlier detection and cleaning complete.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Outliers Detection\n",
    "\n",
    "def detect_outliers_zscore(df, threshold=3):\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    Detect outliers in a DataFrame using the Z-Score method.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Parameters:\n",
    "    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame containing the time series data.\n",
    "    threshold (float): Z-Score threshold above which data points are considered outliers.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Returns:\n",
    "    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame with outliers marked.\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    z_scores = stats.zscore(df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number]))  # Apply Z-score only to numerical columns\n",
    "    abs_z_scores = np.abs(z_scores)\n",
    "    outliers = (abs_z_scores > threshold).any(axis=1)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return df[outliers], df[~outliers]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Apply to time series data\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    # Load the enhanced daily and hourly data\n",
    "    daily_data = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_with_features.csv', index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    hourly_data = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_with_features.csv', index_col='Datetime', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Detect outliers in daily data\n",
    "    daily_outliers, daily_clean = detect_outliers_zscore(daily_data)\n",
    "    daily_outliers.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_outliers.csv')\n",
    "    daily_clean.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_clean.csv')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Detect outliers in hourly data\n",
    "    hourly_outliers, hourly_clean = detect_outliers_zscore(hourly_data)\n",
    "    hourly_outliers.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_outliers.csv')\n",
    "    hourly_clean.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_clean.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Outlier detection and cleaning complete.\")\n"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "8f38d7d2-ef16-4742-a263-13448a2c5d4d",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Feature engineering complete for all stocks and data saved.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Features Engineering using the TA Library\n",
    "\n",
    "def apply_ta_features(df):\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    Apply technical analysis indicators to the stock data using the `ta` library.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Parameters:\n",
    "    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame containing stock data with columns 'Open', 'High', 'Low', 'Close', 'Volume'.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Returns:\n",
    "    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame with new columns containing the calculated technical indicators.\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Simple Moving Average (SMA)\n",
    "    df['SMA_20'] = ta.trend.sma_indicator(df['Close'], window=20)  # 20-period SMA\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Exponential Moving Average (EMA)\n",
    "    df['EMA_20'] = ta.trend.ema_indicator(df['Close'], window=20)  # 20-period EMA\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Relative Strength Index (RSI)\n",
    "    df['RSI'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['Close'], window=14)  # 14-period RSI\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD)\n",
    "    df['MACD'] = ta.trend.macd_diff(df['Close'])  # MACD difference\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Bollinger Bands\n",
    "    bb_indicator = ta.volatility.BollingerBands(df['Close'])\n",
    "    df['BB_upper'] = bb_indicator.bollinger_hband()\n",
    "    df['BB_middle'] = bb_indicator.bollinger_mavg()\n",
    "    df['BB_lower'] = bb_indicator.bollinger_lband()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Average True Range (ATR)\n",
    "    df['ATR'] = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['High'], df['Low'], df['Close'], window=14)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Money Flow Index (MFI)\n",
    "    df['MFI'] = ta.volume.money_flow_index(df['High'], df['Low'], df['Close'], df['Volume'], window=14)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return df\n",
    "\n",
    "# Directories to save enhanced data\n",
    "output_dir_daily = '../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily'\n",
    "output_dir_hourly = '../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly'\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_dir_daily, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_dir_hourly, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Apply feature engineering to all stocks for both daily and hourly data\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    # Apply to daily data\n",
    "    daily_data = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_daily.csv', index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    daily_data_with_features = apply_ta_features(daily_data)\n",
    "    daily_data_with_features.to_csv(f'{output_dir_daily}/{stock}_daily_with_features.csv', index=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Apply to hourly data\n",
    "    hourly_data = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/{stock}_hourly.csv', index_col='Datetime', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    hourly_data_with_features = apply_ta_features(hourly_data)\n",
    "    hourly_data_with_features.to_csv(f'{output_dir_hourly}/{stock}_hourly_with_features.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Feature engineering complete for all stocks and data saved.\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 19,
   "id": "22155530-8f7c-414f-a5f8-e38b87169d3f",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "DataFrame has been reset to the state right after feature engineering.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "\n",
    "def reset_to_feature_engineered_state(stock, data_type='daily'):\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    Resets the DataFrame to the state right after feature engineering by loading it from the saved CSV.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Parameters:\n",
    "    stock (str): Stock ticker symbol (e.g., 'AAPL', 'GOOGL').\n",
    "    data_type (str): Type of data, either 'daily' or 'hourly'.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Returns:\n",
    "    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame loaded from the feature-engineered CSV file.\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    if data_type == 'daily':\n",
    "        file_path = f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_with_features.csv'\n",
    "    elif data_type == 'hourly':\n",
    "        file_path = f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_with_features.csv'\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        raise ValueError(\"data_type must be either 'daily' or 'hourly'\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Load the feature-engineered data\n",
    "    df = pd.read_csv(file_path, index_col=0, parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return df\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example usage for resetting a daily data DataFrame for 'GOOGL'\n",
    "daily_data = reset_to_feature_engineered_state('GOOGL', data_type='daily')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example usage for resetting an hourly data DataFrame for 'GOOGL'\n",
    "hourly_data = reset_to_feature_engineered_state('GOOGL', data_type='hourly')\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"DataFrame has been reset to the state right after feature engineering.\")\n"
   ]
  },

      "BB_upper   0.172104  0.017703  \n",
      "BB_middle  0.095824  0.010528  \n",
      "BB_lower   0.011967  0.002613  \n",
      "ATR        1.000000 -0.173240  \n",
      "MFI       -0.173240  1.000000  \n"

    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x800 with 2 Axes>"

     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Inspect the data after features engineering\n",
    "\n",
    "def inspect_engineered_data(file_path):\n",
    "    # Load the enhanced data\n",
    "    data = pd.read_csv(file_path, index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Display the first few rows of the dataframe\n",
    "    print(\"First few rows of the data:\")\n",
    "    print(data.head())\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Check for missing values\n",
    "    missing_values = data.isnull().sum()\n",
    "    if missing_values.sum() > 0:\n",
    "        print(\"\\nMissing values in each column:\")\n",
    "        print(missing_values[missing_values > 0])\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        print(\"\\nNo missing values found in the dataset.\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Summary statistics\n",
    "    print(\"\\nSummary statistics of the data:\")\n",
    "    print(data.describe())\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Plot closing price and a few selected indicators\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(14, 7))\n",
    "    plt.plot(data['Close'], label='Close Price')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    if 'SMA_20' in data.columns:\n",
    "        plt.plot(data['SMA_20'], label='20-day SMA')\n",
    "    if 'RSI' in data.columns:\n",
    "        plt.plot(data['RSI'], label='RSI')\n",
    "    if 'MACD' in data.columns:\n",
    "        plt.plot(data['MACD'], label='MACD')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    plt.title('Close Price and Selected Indicators')\n",
    "    plt.legend()\n",
    "    plt.show()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Correlation matrix\n",
    "    correlation_matrix = data.corr()\n",
    "    print(\"\\nCorrelation matrix of the features:\")\n",
    "    print(correlation_matrix)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Visualize the correlation matrix\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))\n",
    "    sns.heatmap(correlation_matrix, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', linewidths=0.5)\n",
    "    plt.title('Correlation Matrix of Features')\n",
    "    plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example usage for AAPL daily data (update the file path as needed)\n",
    "inspect_engineered_data('../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/AAPL_daily_with_features.csv')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 21,
   "id": "fe7a8854-4634-4656-bb2f-6f79f6d13851",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Scaling complete for daily and hourly data.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Scaling using StandardScaler\n",
    "\n",
    "# Initialize scalers\n",
    "scaler_daily = StandardScaler()\n",
    "scaler_hourly = StandardScaler()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Scale and save the daily data\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    daily_data_clean = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_cleaned.csv', index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Separate features and target\n",
    "    X_daily = daily_data_clean.drop(columns=['Close'])\n",
    "    y_daily = daily_data_clean['Close'].values.reshape(-1, 1)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Scale features and target\n",
    "    X_daily_scaled = scaler_daily.fit_transform(X_daily)\n",
    "    y_daily_scaled = scaler_daily.fit_transform(y_daily)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Save scaled data back to DataFrame\n",
    "    daily_data_scaled = pd.DataFrame(X_daily_scaled, index=X_daily.index, columns=X_daily.columns)\n",
    "    daily_data_scaled['Close'] = y_daily_scaled\n",
    "    daily_data_scaled.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_scaled.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Scale and save the hourly data\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    hourly_data_clean = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_cleaned.csv', index_col='Datetime', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Separate features and target\n",
    "    X_hourly = hourly_data_clean.drop(columns=['Close'])\n",
    "    y_hourly = hourly_data_clean['Close'].values.reshape(-1, 1)  # Reshape for scaling\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Scale features and target\n",
    "    X_hourly_scaled = scaler_hourly.fit_transform(X_hourly)\n",
    "    y_hourly_scaled = scaler_hourly.fit_transform(y_hourly)  # Scaling target\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Combine scaled features and target back into DataFrame\n",
    "    hourly_data_scaled = pd.DataFrame(X_hourly_scaled, index=X_hourly.index, columns=X_hourly.columns)\n",
    "    hourly_data_scaled['Close'] = y_hourly_scaled  # Use the scaled target\n",
    "    hourly_data_scaled.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_scaled.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Scaling complete for daily and hourly data.\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 105,
   "id": "9537f0a3-9104-4214-b90f-65d86808cae3",
   "metadata": {
    "jupyter": {
     "source_hidden": true
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Normalization complete for daily and hourly data.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Scaling data using MinMaxScaler\n",
    "\n",
    "# Initialize MinMaxScaler\n",
    "scaler_daily = MinMaxScaler()\n",
    "scaler_hourly = MinMaxScaler()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Normalize and save the daily data\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    daily_data_clean = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_cleaned.csv', index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Separate features and target\n",
    "    X_daily = daily_data_clean.drop(columns=['Close'])\n",
    "    y_daily = daily_data_clean['Close'].values\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Normalize features\n",
    "    X_daily_normalized = scaler_daily.fit_transform(X_daily)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Save normalized data back to DataFrame\n",
    "    daily_data_normalized = pd.DataFrame(X_daily_normalized, index=X_daily.index, columns=X_daily.columns)\n",
    "    daily_data_normalized['Close'] = y_daily  # Add back the target column\n",
    "    daily_data_normalized.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_normalized.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Normalize and save the hourly data\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    hourly_data_clean = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_cleaned.csv', index_col='Datetime', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Separate features and target\n",
    "    X_hourly = hourly_data_clean.drop(columns=['Close'])\n",
    "    y_hourly = hourly_data_clean['Close'].values\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Normalize features\n",
    "    X_hourly_normalized = scaler_hourly.fit_transform(X_hourly)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Save normalized data back to DataFrame\n",
    "    hourly_data_normalized = pd.DataFrame(X_hourly_normalized, index=X_hourly.index, columns=X_hourly.columns)\n",
    "    hourly_data_normalized['Close'] = y_hourly  # Add back the target column\n",
    "    hourly_data_normalized.to_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_normalized.csv', index=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Normalization complete for daily and hourly data.\")\n"
   ]
  },

      "\u001b[1m389/389\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 964us/step - loss: 0.0134 - val_loss: 0.0090\n",
      "Epoch 95/100\n",

      "Epoch 96/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m389/389\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 995us/step - loss: 0.0132 - val_loss: 0.0089\n",
      "Epoch 97/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m389/389\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 984us/step - loss: 0.0133 - val_loss: 0.0092\n",
      "Epoch 98/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m389/389\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 942us/step - loss: 0.0133 - val_loss: 0.0092\n",
      "Epoch 99/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m389/389\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 1ms/step - loss: 0.0129 - val_loss: 0.0088\n",
      "Epoch 100/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m389/389\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 947us/step - loss: 0.0128 - val_loss: 0.0088\n",
      "Daily model training complete.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.layers import LSTM, Dense, Dropout\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.callbacks import EarlyStopping\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.optimizers import Adam\n",
    "\n",
    "# Initialize lists to hold training data from all stocks (for daily data)\n",
    "X_train_daily, y_train_daily = [], []\n",
    "X_test_daily, y_test_daily = [], []\n",
    "\n",
    "# Process daily data for each stock\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    # Load the enhanced daily data for the stock\n",
    "    daily_data = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_scaled.csv', index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Define the features (X) and target (y)\n",
    "    X = daily_data.drop(columns=['Close'])  # Using all features except 'Close'\n",
    "    y = daily_data['Close'].values  # Target is the 'Close' price\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Train-test split (80% train, 20% test)\n",
    "    train_size = int(len(X) * 0.8)\n",
    "    X_train, X_test = X[:train_size], X[train_size:]\n",
    "    y_train, y_test = y[:train_size], y[train_size:]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Reshape the data to fit LSTM [samples, time steps, features]\n",
    "    X_train = np.reshape(X_train, (X_train.shape[0], 1, X_train.shape[1]))\n",
    "    X_test = np.reshape(X_test, (X_test.shape[0], 1, X_test.shape[1]))\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Append the data to the lists\n",
    "    X_train_daily.append(X_train)\n",
    "    y_train_daily.append(y_train)\n",
    "    X_test_daily.append(X_test)\n",
    "    y_test_daily.append(y_test)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Convert lists to arrays for training\n",
    "X_train_daily = np.concatenate(X_train_daily, axis=0)\n",
    "y_train_daily = np.concatenate(y_train_daily, axis=0)\n",
    "X_test_daily = np.concatenate(X_test_daily, axis=0)\n",
    "y_test_daily = np.concatenate(y_test_daily, axis=0)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build the LSTM model for daily data\n",
    "model_daily = Sequential()\n",
    "model_daily.add(LSTM(units=50, return_sequences=True, input_shape=(X_train_daily.shape[1], X_train_daily.shape[2])))\n",
    "model_daily.add(Dropout(0.2))\n",
    "model_daily.add(LSTM(units=50))\n",
    "model_daily.add(Dropout(0.2))\n",
    "model_daily.add(Dense(1))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Compile the model with Adam optimizer and lower learning rate\n",
    "opt = Adam(learning_rate=1e-5, clipvalue=1.0)  # Lower learning rate and gradient clipping\n",
    "model_daily.compile(optimizer=opt, loss='mean_squared_error')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Train the model with early stopping\n",
    "early_stop = EarlyStopping(monitor='val_loss', patience=10, restore_best_weights=True)\n",
    "history_daily = model_daily.fit(X_train_daily, y_train_daily, epochs=100, batch_size=32, validation_split=0.2, callbacks=[early_stop])\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Daily model training complete.\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 23,
   "id": "74aab1b4-c624-4ebe-be9e-d16085b2a02d",

     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\u001b[1m122/122\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m0s\u001b[0m 1ms/step\n",
      "Mean Absolute Error (MAE): 0.07954407155958536\n",
      "Mean Squared Error (MSE): 0.017050916024611028\n",
      "Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE): 0.13057915616441634\n",
      "R-Squared (R2): 0.9853979046490341\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error, r2_score\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "# Predictions on the test data\n",
    "y_pred_daily = model_daily.predict(X_test_daily)\n",
    "\n",
    "# If you scaled the Close prices, inverse transform the predictions\n",
    "# y_pred_daily = scaler.inverse_transform(y_pred_daily)\n",
    "# y_test_daily = scaler.inverse_transform(y_test_daily.reshape(-1, 1))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate performance metrics\n",
    "mae = mean_absolute_error(y_test_daily, y_pred_daily)\n",
    "mse = mean_squared_error(y_test_daily, y_pred_daily)\n",
    "rmse = np.sqrt(mse)\n",
    "r2 = r2_score(y_test_daily, y_pred_daily)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Print the metrics\n",
    "print(f\"Mean Absolute Error (MAE): {mae}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Mean Squared Error (MSE): {mse}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE): {rmse}\")\n",
    "print(f\"R-Squared (R2): {r2}\")\n"
   ]
  },

    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Actual vs Predicted Close Prices\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "plt.plot(y_test_daily, label='Actual Close Prices', color='blue')\n",
    "plt.plot(y_pred_daily, label='Predicted Close Prices', color='orange')\n",
    "plt.title('Actual vs Predicted Close Prices')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Close Price')\n",

    "plt.title('Residuals (Actual - Predicted)')\n",

   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load the scaled data for a specific stock (e.g., AAPL)\n",
    "stock = 'AAPL'\n",
    "daily_data_scaled = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/daily/{stock}_daily_scaled.csv', index_col='Date', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Separate features and target\n",
    "X_daily = daily_data_scaled.drop(columns=['Close'])\n",
    "y_daily = daily_data_scaled['Close'].values\n",
    "\n",
    "# Split into training and testing sets (80% train, 20% test)\n",
    "train_size = int(len(X_daily) * 0.8)\n",
    "X_train, X_test = X_daily[:train_size], X_daily[train_size:]\n",
    "y_train, y_test = y_daily[:train_size], y_daily[train_size:]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Reshape for LSTM input [samples, time steps, features]\n",
    "X_test = np.reshape(X_test, (X_test.shape[0], 1, X_test.shape[1]))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Predict using the trained model\n",
    "y_pred = model_daily.predict(X_test)\n",
    "\n",
    "# If you scaled the Close prices, inverse transform the predictions\n",
    "# y_pred = scaler_daily.inverse_transform(y_pred)\n",
    "# y_test = scaler_daily.inverse_transform(y_test.reshape(-1, 1))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Actual vs Predicted Close Prices\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "plt.plot(y_test, label='Actual Close Prices', color='blue')\n",
    "plt.plot(y_pred, label='Predicted Close Prices', color='orange')\n",
    "plt.title(f'Actual vs Predicted Close Prices for {stock}')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Close Price')\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot Residuals\n",
    "residuals = y_test.flatten() - y_pred.flatten()\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "plt.plot(residuals, color='red')\n",
    "plt.title(f'Residuals (Actual - Predicted) for {stock}')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Residuals')\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

      "Epoch 9/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m1396/1396\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m1s\u001b[0m 762us/step - loss: nan - val_loss: nan\n",
      "Epoch 10/100\n",
      "\u001b[1m1396/1396\u001b[0m \u001b[32m━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\u001b[0m\u001b[37m\u001b[0m \u001b[1m1s\u001b[0m 774us/step - loss: nan - val_loss: nan\n",

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Initialize lists to hold training data from all stocks (for hourly data)\n",
    "X_train_hourly, y_train_hourly = [], []\n",
    "X_test_hourly, y_test_hourly = [], []\n",
    "\n",
    "# Process hourly data for each stock\n",
    "for stock in stocks:\n",
    "    # Load the enhanced hourly data for the stock\n",
    "    hourly_data = pd.read_csv(f'../data/stock_data/enhanced/hourly/{stock}_hourly_with_features.csv', index_col='Datetime', parse_dates=True)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Define the features (X) and target (y)\n",
    "    X = hourly_data.drop(columns=['Close'])  # Using all features except 'Close'\n",
    "    y = hourly_data['Close'].values  # Target is the 'Close' price\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Train-test split (80% train, 20% test)\n",
    "    train_size = int(len(X) * 0.8)\n",
    "    X_train, X_test = X[:train_size], X[train_size:]\n",
    "    y_train, y_test = y[:train_size], y[train_size:]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Scale the features using StandardScaler\n",
    "    scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
    "    X_train_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
    "    X_test_scaled = scaler.transform(X_test)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Reshape the data to fit LSTM [samples, time steps, features]\n",
    "    X_train_scaled = np.reshape(X_train_scaled, (X_train_scaled.shape[0], 1, X_train_scaled.shape[1]))\n",
    "    X_test_scaled = np.reshape(X_test_scaled, (X_test_scaled.shape[0], 1, X_test_scaled.shape[1]))\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Append the data to the lists\n",
    "    X_train_hourly.append(X_train_scaled)\n",
    "    y_train_hourly.append(y_train)\n",
    "    X_test_hourly.append(X_test_scaled)\n",
    "    y_test_hourly.append(y_test)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Convert lists to arrays for training\n",
    "X_train_hourly = np.concatenate(X_train_hourly, axis=0)\n",
    "y_train_hourly = np.concatenate(y_train_hourly, axis=0)\n",
    "X_test_hourly = np.concatenate(X_test_hourly, axis=0)\n",
    "y_test_hourly = np.concatenate(y_test_hourly, axis=0)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build the LSTM model for hourly data\n",
    "model_hourly = Sequential()\n",
    "model_hourly.add(LSTM(units=50, return_sequences=True, input_shape=(X_train_hourly.shape[1], X_train_hourly.shape[2])))\n",
    "model_hourly.add(Dropout(0.2))\n",
    "model_hourly.add(LSTM(units=50))\n",
    "model_hourly.add(Dropout(0.2))\n",
    "model_hourly.add(Dense(1))\n",
    "\n",
    "# Compile the model\n",
    "model_hourly.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='mean_squared_error')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Train the model with early stopping\n",
    "early_stop = EarlyStopping(monitor='val_loss', patience=10, restore_best_weights=True)\n",
    "history_hourly = model_hourly.fit(X_train_hourly, y_train_hourly, epochs=100, batch_size=32, validation_split=0.2, callbacks=[early_stop])\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Hourly model training complete.\")\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# Function to print missing values and columns for specific stocks\n",
    "def print_missing_values_for_stocks(stock_list, financials_dict, balance_sheet_dict, cash_flow_dict):\n",
    "    for stock in stock_list:\n",
    "        print(f\"\\n=== Missing Data for {stock} ===\")\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Financials\n",
    "        print(f\"\\n--- {stock} Financials Missing Values ---\")\n",
    "        if stock in financials_dict and not financials_dict[stock].empty:\n",
    "            financials_missing = financials_dict[stock].isnull().sum()\n",
    "            financials_missing = financials_missing[financials_missing > 0]\n",
    "            if not financials_missing.empty:\n",
    "                print(financials_missing)\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                print(\"No missing values in Financials.\")\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            print(\"Financials data not available.\")\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Balance Sheet\n",
    "        print(f\"\\n--- {stock} Balance Sheet Missing Values ---\")\n",
    "        if stock in balance_sheet_dict and not balance_sheet_dict[stock].empty:\n",
    "            balance_sheet_missing = balance_sheet_dict[stock].isnull().sum()\n",
    "            balance_sheet_missing = balance_sheet_missing[balance_sheet_missing > 0]\n",
    "            if not balance_sheet_missing.empty:\n",
    "                print(balance_sheet_missing)\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                print(\"No missing values in Balance Sheet.\")\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            print(\"Balance Sheet data not available.\")\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Cash Flow\n",
    "        print(f\"\\n--- {stock} Cash Flow Missing Values ---\")\n",
    "        if stock in cash_flow_dict and not cash_flow_dict[stock].empty:\n",
    "            cash_flow_missing = cash_flow_dict[stock].isnull().sum()\n",
    "            cash_flow_missing = cash_flow_missing[cash_flow_missing > 0]\n",
    "            if not cash_flow_missing.empty:\n",
    "                print(cash_flow_missing)\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                print(\"No missing values in Cash Flow.\")\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            print(\"Cash Flow data not available.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# List of stocks with significant missing values based on previous analysis\n",
    "stocks_with_missing_values = ['PG', 'WMT', 'HON']\n",
    "\n",
    "# Call the function to print missing data details\n",
    "print_missing_values_for_stocks(stocks_with_missing_values, financials_dict, balance_sheet_dict, cash_flow_dict)"
   ]
  },

    "import yfinance as yf\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example: Download PG data\n",
    "pg = yf.Ticker(\"PG\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Fetch financial data\n",
    "pg_financials = pg.financials\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check the latest date available\n",
    "print(pg_financials.head())  # or .tail() to see the most recent data"
   ]
  },

    "# Check for missing values in GOOGL data\n",

    "print(\"\\n=== GOOGL Financials Missing Values ===\")\n",
    "googl_financials_missing = financials_dict['GOOGL'].isnull().sum()\n",
    "print(googl_financials_missing[googl_financials_missing > 0])\n",
    "\n",

    "print(googl_balance_sheet_missing[googl_balance_sheet_missing > 0])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Cash Flow\n",
    "print(\"\\n=== GOOGL Cash Flow Missing Values ===\")\n",
    "googl_cash_flow_missing = cash_flow_dict['GOOGL'].isnull().sum()\n",
    "print(googl_cash_flow_missing[googl_cash_flow_missing > 0])\n"
   ]

    "metrics_to_check = [\n",
    "    \"Special Income Charges\", \"Other Special Charges\", \"Other Payable\",\n",
    "    \"Inventory\", \"Taxes Receivable\", \"Net Intangibles Purchase And Sale\",\n",
    "    \"Purchase Of Intangibles\", \"Amortization Cash Flow\", \"Amortization Of Intangibles\"\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to check and print missing values for specified metrics\n",
    "def check_metrics_across_stocks(stock_data_dict, metrics):\n",
    "    for stock, df in stock_data_dict.items():\n",
    "        print(f\"\\n=== Checking Metrics for {stock} ===\")\n",
    "        for metric in metrics:\n",
    "            if metric in df.columns:\n",
    "                values = df[metric].dropna().values\n",
    "                if len(values) > 0:\n",
    "                    print(f\"{metric}: {values}\")\n",
    "                else:\n",
    "                    print(f\"{metric}: No data\")\n",
    "            else:\n",
    "                print(f\"{metric}: Not found\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Checking metrics in the financial data\n",
    "check_metrics_across_stocks(financials_dict, metrics_to_check)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Checking metrics in the balance sheet data\n",
    "check_metrics_across_stocks(balance_sheet_dict, metrics_to_check)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Checking metrics in the cash flow data\n",
    "check_metrics_across_stocks(cash_flow_dict, metrics_to_check)"
   ]
  },

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Function to check remaining missing values in the AAPL data\n",
    "def check_remaining_missing_values(df_dict, stock_ticker):\n",
    "    for df_name, df in df_dict.items():\n",
    "        if df.empty:\n",
    "            print(f\"No data available for {df_name}.\")\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "\n",
    "        # Calculate missing values per column\n",
    "        missing_values = df.isnull().sum()\n",
    "        total_missing = missing_values.sum()\n",
    "\n",
    "        if total_missing > 0:\n",
    "            print(f\"\\n--- Missing Values in {df_name} ---\")\n",
    "            print(missing_values[missing_values > 0])\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            print(f\"No remaining missing values in {df_name}.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check remaining missing values for AAPL\n",
    "check_remaining_missing_values({'Financials': financials_dict['AAPL'], \n",
    "                                'Balance Sheet': balance_sheet_dict['AAPL'], \n",
    "                                'Cash Flow': cash_flow_dict['AAPL']}, 'AAPL')\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# Identify and print the rows and columns with missing values in the balance sheet\n",
    "balance_sheet_missing = balance_sheet_dict['AAPL'].isnull()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Print out specific rows and columns with missing values in Balance Sheet\n",
    "print(\"\\n=== AAPL Balance Sheet Rows with Missing Values ===\")\n",
    "print(balance_sheet_dict['AAPL'][balance_sheet_missing.any(axis=1)])\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load the GOOGL filled data CSV\n",
    "googl_filled_data_path = '../data/missing_data/GOOGL_filled_data.csv'  # Update this path as necessary\n",
    "googl_filled_data = pd.read_csv(googl_filled_data_path)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the contents of the filled data\n",
    "print(\"=== GOOGL Filled Data ===\")\n",
    "print(googl_filled_data)\n",
    "\n",
    "# If you want to compare specific columns, you can filter them like this:\n",
    "columns_to_check = [\n",
    "    'Special Income Charges', 'Other Special Charges', 'Other Payable', \n",
    "    'Inventory', 'Taxes Receivable', 'Net Intangibles Purchase And Sale', \n",
    "    'Purchase Of Intangibles', 'Amortization Cash Flow', \n",
    "    'Amortization Of Intangibles'\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display only the columns relevant to your missing values\n",
    "if not googl_filled_data.empty:\n",
    "    print(\"\\n=== Relevant Columns in GOOGL Filled Data ===\")\n",
    "    for col in columns_to_check:\n",
    "        if col in googl_filled_data['Metric'].values:\n",
    "            value = googl_filled_data[googl_filled_data['Metric'] == col]['Value'].values[0]\n",
    "            print(f\"{col}: {value}\")\n",
    "        else:\n",
    "            print(f\"{col}: Not found in GOOGL filled data\")\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print(\"GOOGL Filled Data CSV is empty or not properly loaded.\")\n"
   ]
  },

\u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;28;43;01mNone\u001b[39;49;00m\u001b[43m)\u001b[49m\u001b[43m,\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m   1885\u001b[0m \u001b[43m \u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;124;43m\"\u001b[39;49m\u001b[38;5;124;43mstrict\u001b[39;49m\u001b[38;5;124;43m\"\u001b[39;49m\u001b[43m)\u001b[49m\u001b[43m,\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m   1888\u001b[0m \u001b[43m    \u001b[49m\u001b[43mstorage_options\u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;241;43m=\u001b[39;49m\u001b[38;5;28;43mself\u001b[39;49m\u001b[38;5;241;43m.\u001b[39;49m\u001b[43moptions\u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;241;43m.\u001b[39;49m\u001b[43mget\u001b[49m\u001b[43m(\u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;124;43m\"\u001b[39;49m\u001b[38;5;124;43mstorage_options\u001b[39;49m\u001b[38;5;124;43m\"\u001b[39;49m\u001b[43m,\u001b[49m\u001b[43m \u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;28;43;01mNone\u001b[39;49;00m\u001b[43m)\u001b[49m\u001b[43m,\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m   1889\u001b[0m \u001b[43m\u001b[49m\u001b[43m)\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m   1890\u001b[0m \u001b[38;5;28;01massert\u001b[39;00m \u001b[38;5;28mself\u001b[39m\u001b[38;5;241m.\u001b[39mhandles \u001b[38;5;129;01mis\u001b[39;00m \u001b[38;5;129;01mnot\u001b[39;00m compression, memory_map, is_text, errors, storage_options)\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m    868\u001b[0m \u001b[38;5;28;01melif\u001b[39;00m \u001b[38;5;28misinstance\u001b[39m(handle, \u001b[38;5;28mstr\u001b[39m):\n\u001b[1;32m    869\u001b[0m     \u001b[38;5;66;03m# Check whether the filename is to be opened in binary mode.\u001b[39;00m\n\u001b[1;32m    870\u001b[0m \u001b[38;5;129;01mand\u001b[39;00m \u001b[38;5;124m\"\u001b[39m\u001b[38;5;124mb\u001b[39m\u001b[38;5;124m\"\u001b[39m \u001b[38;5;129;01mnot\u001b[39;00m \u001b[38;5;129;01min\u001b[39;00m ioargs\u001b[38;5;241m.\u001b[39mmode:\n\u001b[1;32m    872\u001b[0m         \u001b[38;5;66;03m# Encoding\u001b[39;00m\n\u001b[0;32m--> 873\u001b[0m         handle \u001b[38;5;241m=\u001b[39m \u001b[38;5;28;43mopen\u001b[39;49m\u001b[43m(\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m    874\u001b[0m \u001b[43m            \u001b[49m\u001b[43mhandle\u001b[49m\u001b[43m,\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m    875\u001b[0m \u001b[43m            \u001b[49m\u001b[43mioargs\u001b[49m\u001b[38;5;241;43m.\u001b[39;49m\u001b[43mmode\u001b[49m\u001b[43m,\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m    876\u001b[0m \u001b[43m \u001b[43m        \u001b[49m\u001b[43m)\u001b[49m\n\u001b[1;32m    880\u001b[0m     \u001b[38;5;28;01melse\u001b[39;00m:\n\u001b[1;32m    881\u001b[0m         \u001b[38;5;66;03m# Binary mode\u001b[39;00m\n\u001b[1;32m    882\u001b[0m         handle \u001b[38;5;241m=\u001b[39m \u001b[38;5;28mopen\u001b[39m(handle, ioargs\u001b[38;5;241m.\u001b[39mmode)\n",
      "\u001b[0;31mFileNotFoundError\u001b[0m: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '../data/stock_data/AAPL_financials.csvAAPL_daily.csv'"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Function to print the date ranges for time series data\n",
    "def print_time_series_date_ranges(stocks, data_path):\n",
    "    for stock in stocks:\n",
    "        # Load the daily data\n",
    "        daily_df = pd.read_csv(f'{data_path}{stock}_daily.csv', index_col=0, parse_dates=True)\n",
    "        daily_range = f\"{daily_df.index.min()} to {daily_df.index.max()}\"\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Load the hourly data\n",
    "        hourly_df = pd.read_csv(f'{data_path}{stock}_hourly.csv', index_col=0, parse_dates=True)\n",
    "        hourly_range = f\"{hourly_df.index.min()} to {hourly_df.index.max()}\"\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Print the ranges\n",
    "        print(f\"{stock} Daily Data Range: {daily_range}\")\n",
    "        print(f\"{stock} Hourly Data Range: {hourly_range}\")\n",
    "        print()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Execute the function\n",
    "print_time_series_date_ranges(stocks, stock_data_path)"
   ]
  },

      "Missing columns in AAPL_filled_data.csv that are present in original data:\n",

      "Extra columns in AAPL_filled_data.csv that are not present in original data:\n",
      "set()\n"

   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load original Apple data (assuming these are already loaded or read from CSVs)\n",
    "financials_df = pd.read_csv('../data/stock_data/AAPL_financials.csv')\n",
    "balance_sheet_df = pd.read_csv('../data/stock_data/AAPL_balance_sheet.csv')\n",
    "cash_flow_df = pd.read_csv('../data/stock_data/AAPL_cash_flow.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load the AAPL_filled_data.csv\n",
    "filled_data_df = pd.read_csv('../data/missing_data/AAPL_filled_data.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Combine all original data columns into a single set\n",
    "original_columns = set(financials_df.columns) | set(balance_sheet_df.columns) | set(cash_flow_df.columns)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Columns in the filled CSV\n",
    "filled_columns = set(filled_data_df['Metric'])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Find missing columns in the filled data that are present in original data\n",
    "missing_in_filled = original_columns - filled_columns\n",
    "\n",
    "# Find extra columns in the filled data that are not in the original data\n",
    "extra_in_filled = filled_columns - original_columns\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Missing columns in AAPL_filled_data.csv that are present in original data:\")\n",
    "print(missing_in_filled)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\nExtra columns in AAPL_filled_data.csv that are not present in original data:\")\n",
    "print(extra_in_filled)\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load original Apple stock data\n",
    "original_data = {\n",
    "    'financials': pd.read_csv('../data/stock_data/AAPL_financials.csv'),\n",
    "    'balance_sheet': pd.read_csv('../data/stock_data/AAPL_balance_sheet.csv'),\n",
    "    'cash_flow': pd.read_csv('../data/stock_data/AAPL_cash_flow.csv'),\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load the filled data\n",
    "filled_data = pd.read_csv('../data/missing_data/AAPL_filled_data.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Fill the missing values in the original data with the filled data\n",
    "for index, row in filled_data.iterrows():\n",
    "    metric = row['Metric']\n",
    "    filled_value = row['Value']\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for df_name, df in original_data.items():\n",
    "        if metric in df.columns:\n",
    "            original_data[df_name][metric].fillna(filled_value, inplace=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check for remaining missing values\n",
    "for df_name, df in original_data.items():\n",
    "    missing_values = df.isna().sum()\n",
    "    missing_columns = missing_values[missing_values > 0]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    if not missing_columns.empty:\n",
    "        print(f\"--- Remaining Missing Values in {df_name} ---\")\n",
    "        print(missing_columns)\n",
    "        print()\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        print(f\"No remaining missing values in {df_name}.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Check for rows that still have missing values\n",
    "for df_name, df in original_data.items():\n",
    "    rows_with_missing_values = df[df.isna().any(axis=1)]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    if not rows_with_missing_values.empty:\n",
    "        print(f\"--- Rows with Missing Values in {df_name} ---\")\n",
    "        print(rows_with_missing_values)\n",
    "        print()\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        print(f\"No rows with missing values in {df_name}.\")\n"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 22,
   "id": "9947b93e-a58e-4b69-892a-4c243541afb5",
   "metadata": {
    "scrolled": true
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "=== AAPL Financials Stats ===\n",
      "Before Dropping Columns:\n",
      "{'Total Columns': 39, 'Missing Values': 0}\n",
      "After Dropping Columns:\n",
      "{'Total Columns': 39, 'Missing Values': 0}\n",
      "\n",
      "=== AAPL Balance Sheet Stats ===\n",
      "Before Dropping Columns:\n",
      "{'Total Columns': 68, 'Missing Values': 79}\n",
      "After Dropping Columns:\n",
      "{'Total Columns': 56, 'Missing Values': 62}\n",
      "\n",
      "=== AAPL Cash Flow Stats ===\n",
      "Before Dropping Columns:\n",
      "{'Total Columns': 53, 'Missing Values': 55}\n",
      "After Dropping Columns:\n",
      "{'Total Columns': 50, 'Missing Values': 52}\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Cell 3: Drop Irrelevant Columns and Show Stats\n",
    "\n",
    "# List of columns to drop based on previous analysis\n",
    "columns_to_drop = [\n",
    "    'Treasury Shares Number', 'Deferred Tax Assets', 'Deferred Tax Liabilities', \n",
    "    'Prepaid Assets', 'Employee Benefits', 'Inventory Adjustments', 'Other Receivables', \n",
    "    'Gain/Loss on Sale of Assets', 'Current Deferred Liabilities', 'Deferred Revenue', \n",
    "    'Non-Current Prepaid Assets', 'Other Intangible Assets',\n",
    "    'Ordinary Shares Number', 'Other Non Current Liabilities', 'Gross PPE', 'Net PPE', \n",
    "    'Net Tangible Assets', 'Other Equity Adjustments', 'Other Short Term Investments', \n",
    "    'Total Tax Payable', 'Other Investments', 'Net PPE Purchase And Sale', \n",
    "    'Repurchase Of Capital Stock', 'Gain Loss On Investment Securities', 'Other Non Cash Items'\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to drop columns and show stats before and after\n",
    "def drop_columns_and_show_stats(df_dict, columns_to_drop):\n",
    "    stats_before = {}\n",
    "    stats_after = {}\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for stock, df in df_dict.items():\n",
    "        if not df.empty:  # Ensure there is data to process\n",
    "            # Capture stats before dropping columns\n",
    "            stats_before[stock] = {\n",
    "                'Total Columns': df.shape[1],\n",
    "                'Missing Values': df.isnull().sum().sum()\n",
    "            }\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Drop the columns\n",
    "            df_dropped = df.drop(columns=columns_to_drop, errors='ignore')\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Capture stats after dropping columns\n",
    "            stats_after[stock] = {\n",
    "                'Total Columns': df_dropped.shape[1],\n",
    "                'Missing Values': df_dropped.isnull().sum().sum()\n",
    "            }\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Update the dataframe in the dictionary\n",
    "            df_dict[stock] = df_dropped\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return stats_before, stats_after\n",
    "\n",
    "# Apply the function to all financial dataframes\n",
    "financials_before, financials_after = drop_columns_and_show_stats(financials_dict, columns_to_drop)\n",
    "balance_sheet_before, balance_sheet_after = drop_columns_and_show_stats(balance_sheet_dict, columns_to_drop)\n",
    "cash_flow_before, cash_flow_after = drop_columns_and_show_stats(cash_flow_dict, columns_to_drop)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the stats before and after for one of the stocks (e.g., AAPL)\n",
    "if 'AAPL' in financials_before:\n",
    "    print(\"=== AAPL Financials Stats ===\")\n",
    "    print(\"Before Dropping Columns:\")\n",
    "    print(financials_before['AAPL'])\n",
    "    print(\"After Dropping Columns:\")\n",
    "    print(financials_after['AAPL'])\n",
    "\n",
    "if 'AAPL' in balance_sheet_before:\n",
    "    print(\"\\n=== AAPL Balance Sheet Stats ===\")\n",
    "    print(\"Before Dropping Columns:\")\n",
    "    print(balance_sheet_before['AAPL'])\n",
    "    print(\"After Dropping Columns:\")\n",
    "    print(balance_sheet_after['AAPL'])\n",
    "\n",
    "if 'AAPL' in cash_flow_before:\n",
    "    print(\"\\n=== AAPL Cash Flow Stats ===\")\n",
    "    print(\"Before Dropping Columns:\")\n",
    "    print(cash_flow_before['AAPL'])\n",
    "    print(\"After Dropping Columns:\")\n",
    "    print(cash_flow_after['AAPL'])"
   ]
  },

   ],
   "source": [
    "# Cell 4: Group Stocks by Missing Columns in Fundamental Data\n",
    "\n",
    "from collections import defaultdict\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to group stocks based on missing columns\n",
    "def group_stocks_by_missing_columns(df_dict):\n",
    "    missing_columns_groups = defaultdict(list)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for stock, df in df_dict.items():\n",
    "        # Find missing columns for the current stock\n",
    "        missing_columns = df.columns[df.isnull().any()].tolist()\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Create a tuple from the list of missing columns (to use as a dictionary key)\n",
    "        missing_columns_tuple = tuple(sorted(missing_columns))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Append the stock to the corresponding group\n",
    "        missing_columns_groups[missing_columns_tuple].append(stock)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return missing_columns_groups\n",
    "\n",
    "# Group stocks for each fundamental data type\n",
    "financials_missing_groups = group_stocks_by_missing_columns(financials_dict)\n",
    "balance_sheet_missing_groups = group_stocks_by_missing_columns(balance_sheet_dict)\n",
    "cash_flow_missing_groups = group_stocks_by_missing_columns(cash_flow_dict)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to display the grouped stocks by missing columns\n",
    "def display_missing_groups(missing_groups, data_type):\n",
    "    print(f\"=== {data_type} Missing Columns Groups ===\\n\")\n",
    "    for missing_columns, stocks in missing_groups.items():\n",
    "        print(f\"Missing columns: {missing_columns}\")\n",
    "        print(f\"Stocks: {stocks}\")\n",
    "        print(\"\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Display the grouped stocks for each data type\n",
    "display_missing_groups(financials_missing_groups, \"Financials\")\n",
    "display_missing_groups(balance_sheet_missing_groups, \"Balance Sheet\")\n",
    "display_missing_groups(cash_flow_missing_groups, \"Cash Flow\")"
   ]
  },

   "execution_count": 15,

     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load the AAPL CSV file to extract its columns\n",
    "aapl_csv_path = '../data/missing_data/AAPL_financials.csv'\n",
    "aapl_csv_data = pd.read_csv(aapl_csv_path)\n",
    "aapl_csv_columns = set(aapl_csv_data.columns)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Columns in AAPL CSV data:\")\n",
    "print(aapl_csv_columns)"
   ]

   "source": [
    "# Function to compare missing values with CSV and suggest improvements\n",
    "def compare_and_improve_csv(filled_data, original_data, stock_name):\n",
    "    missing_columns = set(filled_data['Metric']) - set(original_data.columns)\n",
    "    if missing_columns:\n",
    "        print(f\"Missing columns in {stock_name} CSV: {missing_columns}\")\n",
    "        print(\"Suggested improvements:\")\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Suggest creating new columns in CSV for the missing metrics\n",
    "        for metric in missing_columns:\n",
    "            print(f\"Add column '{metric}' to the CSV for {stock_name}.\")\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        print(f\"No missing columns for {stock_name}. CSV structure is fine.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load the filled data and original data\n",
    "aapl_filled_data = pd.read_csv('../data/missing_data/AAPL_filled_data.csv')\n",
    "aapl_original_data = pd.read_csv('../data/missing_data/AAPL_financials.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "googl_filled_data = pd.read_csv('../data/missing_data/GOOGL_filled_data.csv')\n",
    "googl_original_data = pd.read_csv('../data/missing_data/GOOGL_financials.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Compare and improve CSV for AAPL and GOOGL\n",
    "compare_and_improve_csv(aapl_filled_data, aapl_original_data, 'AAPL')\n",
    "compare_and_improve_csv(googl_filled_data, googl_original_data, 'GOOGL')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 14,
   "id": "d6451cc8-3a38-43f1-ac72-430bf5a62f0a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Updated ../data/missing_data/AAPL_financials.csv with missing columns.\n",
      "Updated ../data/missing_data/GOOGL_financials.csv with missing columns.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "# Function to add missing columns to CSV and initialize with NaN\n",
    "def add_missing_columns(csv_path, missing_columns):\n",
    "    df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for column in missing_columns:\n",
    "        if column not in df.columns:\n",
    "            df[column] = np.nan  # Initialize missing columns with NaN\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Save the updated DataFrame back to CSV\n",
    "    df.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)\n",
    "    print(f\"Updated {csv_path} with missing columns.\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example usage for AAPL\n",
    "aapl_missing_columns = [\n",
    "    'Change In Working Capital', 'Available For Sale Securities', 'Long Term Debt',\n",
    "    'Tradeand Other Payables Non Current', 'Common Stock', 'Change In Other Current Assets',\n",
    "    # Add other missing columns here...\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "aapl_csv_path = '../data/missing_data/AAPL_financials.csv'\n",
    "add_missing_columns(aapl_csv_path, aapl_missing_columns)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example usage for GOOGL\n",
    "googl_missing_columns = [\n",
    "    'Current Liabilities', 'Cash Dividends Paid', 'Total Liabilities Net Minority Interest',\n",
    "    'Total Non-Current Liabilities Net Minority Interest', 'Invested Capital', 'Income Tax Payable',\n",
    "    # Add other missing columns here...\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "googl_csv_path = '../data/missing_data/GOOGL_financials.csv'\n",
    "add_missing_columns(googl_csv_path, googl_missing_columns)"
   ]
  },

    "\n",
    "# Function to fill missing values and create/update CSV\n",
    "def fill_missing_values_and_create_csv(df_dict, stock_ticker, fill_data):\n",
    "    print(f\"\\n=== Filling Missing Values for {stock_ticker} ===\")\n",
    "    filled_data = {}\n",
    "    for column, value in fill_data.items():\n",
    "        for df_name, df in df_dict.items():\n",
    "            if column in df.columns:\n",
    "                df[column].fillna(value, inplace=True)\n",
    "                filled_data[column] = value\n",
    "                print(f\"{column} in {df_name} filled with value: {value}\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Convert the filled data to DataFrame and save to CSV\n",
    "    filled_df = pd.DataFrame(list(filled_data.items()), columns=['Metric', 'Value'])\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Ensure the directory exists\n",
    "    save_dir = os.path.join('..', 'data', 'missing_data')\n",
    "    os.makedirs(save_dir, exist_ok=True)\n",
    "\n",
    "    # Save the CSV to the correct path\n",
    "    save_path = os.path.join(save_dir, f'{stock_ticker}_filled_data.csv')\n",
    "    filled_df.to_csv(save_path, index=False)\n",
    "    print(f\"\\nFilled data saved to {save_path}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Example usage:\n",
    "# Assuming financials_dict is already defined and populated\n",
    "fill_missing_values_and_create_csv(financials_dict, 'AAPL', aapl_fill_data)"
   ]
  }
 ],
